CustomField.formula:
IF(
TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)="","- Property: Add Number of Bedrooms",
IF(
Development_address__r.Utility_Year__c="", "- Development: Add Utility Year",
IF(
TEXT(Development_address__r.Bldg_Type_for_Utilities__c)="", "- Development: Add Building Type for Utilities",
IF(
AND(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Heat")=FALSE,TEXT(Development_address__r.HOMEtracker__Heating__c)=""),"- Development: Add Heat Type",
IF(
AND(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Cooking")=FALSE,TEXT(Development_address__r.Stove_Type__c)=""),"- Development: Add Cooking Type",
IF(
AND(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Water Heat")=FALSE,TEXT(Development_address__r.Water_Heater_Type__c)=""),"- Development: Add Water Heat Type",
"Good"
))))))
CustomField.label: Utility Calculator Data Check
